resources.string: New SSL/TLS encryption modes and edge certificates, Universal SSL toggle, Transform Rules, IP access rules, plus HTTP/2·HTTP/3·Brotli and other performance and cache controls.
R2 now supports folder browsing, object copy/move, and per-bucket CORS and public access settings; cache purge adds “purge by URL”.
Home widget, live logs & wider support
A new daybreak “account overview” home widget; live tail logs are promoted to Live Updates (Android 16); Help & Feedback can attach a diagnostic log; now supports Android 9 and above.
You can now add domains, create and delete D1 databases and tunnels, manage Worker variables/secrets/triggers/domains, and a tunnel’s public hostname routes.
Sign in with Cloudflare\'s official authorization — no API tokens to paste.
DNS, analytics, WAF, Snippets, Workers live logs, and R2/D1/KV storage — all in one place.
